title: How India Lost Its Daughter: Remorseless Accused Used Fake Call To Dodge Suspicion
description: The Saket Court on Thursday granted Delhi Police four days of custodial interrogation of accused Rahul Meena, arrested in connection with the alleged rape and murder of a 22-year-old IRS officer’s daughter in South Delhi’s Kailash Hills. The victim, an IIT Delhi graduate preparing for her first UPSC exam, was found unconscious in her study room and later declared dead at hospital.
